name: MGBPublic Flood MapServer
mvp_use: point-in-polygon flood susceptibility for a geocoded address
notes: Live count check returned 87968 features on 2026-07-03. License clarity is weak; cite DENR-MGB/GeoRiskPH.

name: MMDA Flood-Prone Areas FeatureServer
role: Metro Manila historical/local flood-prone point signal
mvp_use: nearest flood-prone point and city-filtered flood history
notes: Live count check returned 593 features on 2026-07-03. Treat as points, not flood polygons.

name: MMDA River Line FeatureServer
mvp_use: nearest river or waterway distance around address
notes: Live count check returned 6908 features on 2026-07-03. River proximity is context, not proof of flooding.

name: PHIVOLCS Liquefaction MapServer
notes: Live count check returned 239 features on 2026-07-03. Record class code and PHIVOLCS acknowledgement.

name: PHIVOLCS ActiveFault MapServer
mvp_use: query NCR bbox and compute nearest active-fault line distance locally
notes: Live count check returned 6582 features on 2026-07-03. Use local distance calculation instead of relying on server nearest behavior.

name: Project NOAH Hazard Maps on BetterGov
role: national flood, landslide, debris-flow, and storm-surge package
mvp_use: point-in-polygon hazard zone checks after PMTiles schema inspection
notes: Latest version date 2026-04-11; resource id 416; ODC-ODbL. Large 5.55 GB PMTiles file.

name: HDX Philippines Subnational Administrative Boundaries
role: NCR, city, and barangay join layer
mvp_use: normalize address packets to NCR, city, and barangay
notes: Metadata modified 2026-06-24; formats include Geodatabase, SHP, GeoJSON, and XLSX; CC BY-IGO.

name: OpenStreetMap / Geofabrik Philippines
role: waterway, road, facility, and weak-service proxy source
access_method: Geofabrik PBF/GPKG downloads and lightweight Overpass checks
mvp_use: waterway proximity and mapped facility context; waste/disposal proxy only when tags are present
automation_status: MVP-ready for bulk ETL with ODbL handling
notes: ODbL attribution required. Do not treat missing OSM tags as absence of risk.

name: MGBPublic RainInducedLandslide MapServer
role: landslide exposure layer where geographically relevant
mvp_use: point-in-polygon landslide check, with explicit low relevance for most flat NCR addresses
notes: Older hazard vintage observed by agent; report no-hit as not applicable or unknown, not as guaranteed safety.

name: PAGASA Pasig-Marikina-Tullahan FFWS
access_method: public map and observed JSON endpoint
mvp_use: current flood context for addresses near relevant basins
notes: Not a historical or parcel hazard layer. Endpoint may change.

name: HazardHunterPH / GeoRiskPH
access_method: web application and public GeoRiskPH surfaces where allowed
mvp_use: manual official cross-check and caveat language
notes: Do not bypass access controls or automate gated features.

name: PHIVOLCS FaultFinder
mvp_use: manual cross-check of nearest fault distance
automation_status: manual-first; automate using ActiveFault MapServer instead
notes: Do not treat as a documented bulk API.

name: PHIVOLCS GroundShaking MapServer
mvp_use: supplemental point identify after more validation
notes: Identify endpoint worked in agent check; query behavior needs more validation.

name: PHIVOLCS Tsunami MapServer
access_method: ArcGIS REST MapServer identify or query candidate
mvp_use: run only for coastal Metro Manila addresses
notes: Inland no-hit is not complete safety proof; validate coverage before scoring.

name: BetterGov Flood Control Projects Dashboard data
mvp_use: weak context only after inspecting resource schema and coordinates
notes: Dataset search returned id 2 with latest_version_date 2025-09-21 and CC0. Project presence is not service quality.

name: LGU waste and sanitation pages
mvp_use: include only as weak_proxy or unknown; never as proof of bad service
notes: Schedules and service pages do not prove reliability.
